'''Lommite Limited (LL)''' was a [[Dorvalla/Legends|Dorvallan]] [[Lommite/Legends|lommite]] mining company who was a rival of fellow ore mining company, [[InterGalactic Ore]]. When [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] was governor of [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]], which had a shipbuilding lommite economy, he arranged a competition with InterGalactic Ore for Lommite Limited. The competition was a race to deliver ore to Eriadu. Both competed well, but the barges were sabotaged by the [[Toom clan]] and crashed into each other. The [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] quickly took over both companies and merged them into [[Dorvalla Mining]] in [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]]. Its executive officer was [[Jurnel Arrant]] and its chief of field operations was [[Patch Bruit]].
